query:
ALTER TABLE themeSettings 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS heroBackgroundImage VARCHAR(1000),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS heroBackgroundVideo VARCHAR(1000),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS shopBackgroundImage VARCHAR(1000),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS eventsBackgroundImage VARCHAR(1000),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS footerBackgroundImage VARCHAR(1000);
